languages.text: "В кои-то веки слышу умную мысль из уст твоего сородича". {n}Пристальный взгляд {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}друкари{/g}, обращенный на юношу, заставляет того резко замолчать.{/n} "С другой стороны, ваши железки только усиливают боль, источником которой служит этот скот, так что тут я скорее против".

traits.locale_text: "В кои-то веки слышу умную мысль из уст твоего сородича". {n}Пристальный взгляд {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}друкари{/g}, обращенный на юношу, заставляет того резко замолчать.{/n} "С другой стороны, ваши железки только усиливают боль, источником которой служит этот скот, так что тут я скорее против".
traits.speaker: MarazhaiCompanion

languages.text: "For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}'s gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."
languages.original_text: "В кои-то веки слышу умную мысль из уст твоего сородича". {n}Пристальный взгляд {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}друкари{/g}, обращенный на юношу, заставляет того резко замолчать.{/n} "С другой стороны, ваши железки только усиливают боль, источником которой служит этот скот, так что тут я скорее против".

traits.locale_text: "For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}'s gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."

"For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The Drukhari's gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."

"For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The Drukhari's gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."

languages.text: 「あなたの種族から、初めて賢明な考えが口から出た。しかし、このような牛に金属を埋め込むことは、私が引き出す苦痛を増すだけなので、今回は異議を唱える」{n}{/n}
languages.original_text: "For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The Drukhari's gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの種族から、初めて賢明な考えが口から出た。しかし、このような牛に金属を埋め込むことは、私が引き出す苦痛を増すだけなので、今回は異議を唱える。」

languages.text: “你们族类的嘴里总算吐出了一个聪明的想法。”{n}那位{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}黑暗灵族{/g}的目光紧锁着年轻人，令他顿时噤声。{/n}“不过话说回来，在这些牲口身上植入金属，可以让我从他们身上榨取更多痛苦，所以这次我必须表示反对。”
languages.original_text: "For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}'s gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."

traits.locale_text: “你们族类的嘴里总算吐出了一个聪明的想法。”{n}那位{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}黑暗灵族{/g}的目光紧锁着年轻人，令他顿时噤声。{/n}“不过话说回来，在这些牲口身上植入金属，可以让我从他们身上榨取更多痛苦，所以这次我必须表示反对。”

languages.text: «Por una vez escapa un pensamiento inteligente de los labios de alguien de tu especie». {n}La mirada del {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} se centra en el joven, instándole a guardar silencio.{/n} «Dicho eso, implantar metal en esta clase de ganado solo aumenta el dolor que puedo infligirle, por lo que, en esta ocasión, no estoy de acuerdo».
languages.original_text: "For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}'s gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."

traits.locale_text: «Por una vez escapa un pensamiento inteligente de los labios de alguien de tu especie». {n}La mirada del {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} se centra en el joven, instándole a guardar silencio.{/n} «Dicho eso, implantar metal en esta clase de ganado solo aumenta el dolor que puedo infligirle, por lo que, en esta ocasión, no estoy de acuerdo».

languages.text: "Ausnahmsweise einmal ein intelligenter Gedanke von jemandem Eurer Art." {n}Der Blick des {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} ruht auf dem jungen Mann, der daraufhin plötzlich verstummt.{/n} "Andererseits erhöht die Implantation von Metall in derartiges Vieh nur den Schmerz, den ich aus ihm ziehen kann. Ich muss in diesem Fall also widersprechen."
languages.original_text: "For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}'s gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."

traits.locale_text: "Ausnahmsweise einmal ein intelligenter Gedanke von jemandem Eurer Art." {n}Der Blick des {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} ruht auf dem jungen Mann, der daraufhin plötzlich verstummt.{/n} "Andererseits erhöht die Implantation von Metall in derartiges Vieh nur den Schmerz, den ich aus ihm ziehen kann. Ich muss in diesem Fall also widersprechen."

languages.text: « Il est rare d'entendre des propos aussi intelligents sortir de la bouche d'un mon-keigh. » {n}Le jeune homme est réduit au silence par le regard intense que braque sur lui le {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}.{/n} « D'un autre côté, comme l'implantation de métal ne fait qu'augmenter la douleur que je peux retirer du bétail, je me vois contraint d'exprimer mon désaccord dans ce cas précis. »
languages.original_text: "For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}'s gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."

traits.locale_text: « Il est rare d'entendre des propos aussi intelligents sortir de la bouche d'un mon-keigh. » {n}Le jeune homme est réduit au silence par le regard intense que braque sur lui le {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}.{/n} « D'un autre côté, comme l'implantation de métal ne fait qu'augmenter la douleur que je peux retirer du bétail, je me vois contraint d'exprimer mon désaccord dans ce cas précis. »

languages.text: "Bir kereliğine türünüzün dudaklarından zekice bir düşünce döküldü." {n}{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari'nin{/g} bakışları, dikkatle genç adamın üzerinde durarak onu aniden sessizliğe zorluyor.{/n} "Öte yandan böyle sığırlara metal implant takmak, onlardan sağacağım acıyı artırır. Bu yüzden bu durumda aynı fikirde olamayacağım."
languages.original_text: "For once, an intelligent thought from the lips of your kind." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}'s gaze rests intently on the young man, compelling him into sudden silence.{/n} "Then again, implanting such cattle with metal only increases the pain I can derive from them, so I must disagree in this instance."

traits.locale_text: "Bir kereliğine türünüzün dudaklarından zekice bir düşünce döküldü." {n}{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari'nin{/g} bakışları, dikkatle genç adamın üzerinde durarak onu aniden sessizliğe zorluyor.{/n} "Öte yandan böyle sığırlara metal implant takmak, onlardan sağacağım acıyı artırır. Bu yüzden bu durumda aynı fikirde olamayacağım."
